name: FIRST BANCORP /NC/
summary: PART I General Description The Company is the fourth largest commercial bank holding company headquartered in North Carolina. At December31, 2025, the Company had total consolidated assets of $12.7 billion, total loans of $8.7 billion, total deposits of $10.7 billion, and shareholders equity of $1.7 billion. Our principal activity is the ownership and operation of the Bank, a state-chartered bank with its headquarters in Southern Pines, North Carolina, through which we engage in a full range of ...
